name: @authn.sh/openapi
description: OpenAPI 3.1 specifications for the authn.sh BAPI and FAPI (two roots, shared components). Source of truth for SDK code generation.

scripts.lint: npm run lint:bapi && npm run lint:fapi
scripts.bundle: npm run bundle:bapi && npm run bundle:fapi
scripts.bundle:bapi: redocly bundle bapi.yaml -o dist/bapi.bundled.yaml --ext yaml && redocly bundle bapi.yaml -o dist/bapi.bundled.json --ext json
scripts.bundle:fapi: redocly bundle fapi.yaml -o dist/fapi.bundled.yaml --ext yaml && redocly bundle fapi.yaml -o dist/fapi.bundled.json --ext json
